name: induce_override_phase_b_item5_smoke
description: Smoke test for Phase B Item 5 (OOP induce — trap-check + check-raise). TieredBot (hero) vs ManiacBot (high cbet_attempt_rate, high barrel_frequency — should trigger both OOP branches). One arm with rule OFF (control) and one ON (variant). Validates the new branches are evaluated and route correctly.
hypothesis: Branch dispatch correctly routes OOP open-spot decisions to trap_check and OOP facing-bet decisions to check_raise. At smoke scale (1 tournament × 500 hands) we expect 0-3 fires of each branch — the IP-vs-OOP coin flip combined with strong-hand rarity puts fire counts in similar territory to Item 4's smoke.
